selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [44s-59s] The camera view stabilizes. The wearer turns to their left and places a folded onesie onto the lower platen of a heat press machine. They pull the orange handle of the machine down to clamp it shut. A digital timer on the machine counts down, and after a few seconds, it beeps. The wearer lifts the handle, removes the hot onesie from the press, and places it back on the table in front of them. They unfold the fabric to reveal a small printed logo that has been transferred onto the chest. After briefly inspecting the logo, they fold the onesie back up and place it onto a stack of finished garments to their left.

[60s-119s] The wearer performs a complete, uninterrupted cycle of the labeling task. They reach to the pile of unmarked onesies on their left, grab one, and lay it flat on the table. They smooth it out and fold the bottom half of the garment upwards. Next, they reach into an open cardboard box on their right, pick up a single small white label, and position it carefully on the upper chest area of the folded onesie. They then fold the top half of the onesie down over the label to cover it. The wearer picks up the folded bundle, turns to the heat press on the left, places it inside, and pulls the handle down. After the machine beeps, they lift the handle, retrieve the onesie, and place it on the table. They unfold it to check the transferred "Hello Kitty" logo, then quickly fold the onesie again and add it to the completed pile on the left.
window_activities: Unfold garment to inspect transferred logo
